name: Bug Report
about: Report a defect so we can fix it
title: "[Bug] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Describe the bug

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Run '...'
3. See error

## Expected behavior

A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

## Actual behavior

What actually happened, including any error messages or stack traces.

## Environment

- OS: [e.g. Ubuntu 22.04]
- Python version: [e.g. 3.11]
- Branch / commit: [e.g. `main` @ `abc1234`]

## Additional context

Add any other context about the problem here.
